chat_messages.message: hello i am  nehal not fell well
chat_messages.response: Hello from your local Ayurvedic AI advisor!
Hello from your local Ayurvedic AI advisor!

🌿 **Doshas** are the three fundamental bio-energies in Ayurveda that govern all physical and mental processes:

1. **Vata** (Air + Space) — Movement & creativity
2. **Pitta** (Fire + Water) — Transformation & digestion
3. **Kapha** (Earth + Water) — Structure & stability

Everyone has a unique combination (Prakriti). When doshas go out of balance (Vikriti), health issues arise. The goal of Ayurveda is to restore your natural balance through diet, lifestyle, and herbal remedies.

🧘 **Ayurvedic Stress Management:**

• **Pranayama:** Practice Nadi Shodhana (alternate nostril breathing) — 5 min daily
• **Herbs:** Ashwagandha, Brahmi, Jatamansi are excellent adaptogens
• **Abhyanga:** Daily warm oil self-massage calms the nervous system
• **Meditation:** Start with 10 minutes of silent sitting
• **Routine:** Follow a consistent daily routine (Dinacharya)
• **Warm bath:** Add a few drops of lavender oil
• **Diet:** Avoid caffeine, eat warm, nourishing foods
• **Exercise:** Gentle yoga, walking in nature

🙏 **Namaste! I'm your Ayurvedic AI Health Assistant.**

I can answer questions about:

🫁 **Doshas** — Vata, Pitta, Kapha
🍽️ **Diet & Nutrition** — food for your type
🌿 **Herbs & Remedies** — natural treatments
🧘 **Yoga & Pranayama** — dosha-specific practices
💊 **Health Conditions** — BP, diabetes, joints, skin, hair, digestion, sleep, stress, immunity, liver, kidneys, eyes, memory, hormones
🌅 **Daily Routine** — Dinacharya & seasonal tips
🔥 **Detox & Fasting** — Panchakarma, Triphala

Just type your question or symptom and I'll help!

😴 **Ayurvedic Sleep Remedies:**

• Bed by **10 PM** (Kapha time for deepest sleep)
• Warm milk + pinch of nutmeg + cardamom at bedtime
• Brahmi or Ashwagandha herb before sleep
• Foot massage with warm sesame or brahmi oil
• Avoid screens 1 hour before sleep
• Yoga Nidra meditation (20 min) before bed
• Keep bedroom cool, dark and quiet

🌿 **The Three Doshas:**

1. **Vata** (Air + Space) — Movement, creativity, communication
2. **Pitta** (Fire + Water) — Metabolism, digestion, intelligence
3. **Kapha** (Earth + Water) — Structure, lubrication, stability

Everyone has a unique mix called **Prakriti** (constitution). Imbalance (Vikriti) causes disease. Ayurveda restores balance through diet, lifestyle & herbs.

🌬️ **Vata Dosha** (Air + Space)

Creative, quick-thinking, energetic. When imbalanced: anxiety, dry skin, constipation, insomnia.

**Balance with:**
• Warm, cooked, slightly oily foods (ghee, sesame oil)
• Regular daily routine — same wake/sleep times
• Warm herbal teas: ginger, licorice, cinnamon
• Grounding yoga: Tree Pose, Child's Pose, forward bends
• Sesame oil self-massage (Abhyanga) daily

🌬️ **Vata Dosha** (Air + Space)

Creative, quick-thinking, energetic. When imbalanced: anxiety, dry skin, constipation, insomnia.

**Balance with:**
• Warm, cooked, slightly oily foods (ghee, sesame oil)
• Regular daily routine — same wake/sleep times
• Warm herbal teas: ginger, licorice, cinnamon
• Grounding yoga: Tree Pose, Child's Pose, forward bends
• Sesame oil self-massage (Abhyanga) daily

🌿 **Key Ayurvedic Herbs Quick Reference:**

| Herb | Primary Use |
|---|---|
| **Ashwagandha** | Stress, energy, immunity |
| **Brahmi** | Memory, anxiety, focus |
| **Triphala** | Digestion, detox, anti-aging |
| **Tulsi** | Cold, cough, immunity |
| **Shatavari** | Women's health, hormones |
| **Guduchi (Giloy)** | Fever, immunity, liver |
| **Guggul** | Cholesterol, joints, thyroid |
| **Shallaki** | Arthritis, joint pain |
| **Neem** | Skin, blood purifier |
| **Amla (Amalaki)** | Vitamin C, hair, anti-aging |

⚠️ Always consult a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner before starting herbs.

😴 **Ayurvedic Sleep Remedies:**

• Bed by **10 PM** (Kapha time for deepest sleep)
• Warm milk + pinch of nutmeg + cardamom at bedtime
• Brahmi or Ashwagandha herb before sleep
• Foot massage with warm sesame or brahmi oil
• Avoid screens 1 hour before sleep
• Yoga Nidra meditation (20 min) before bed
• Keep bedroom cool, dark and quiet

chat_messages.message: What are the benefits of Ashwagandha?
chat_messages.response:
💪 **Ashwagandha — The Strength Herb:**

• Reduces **cortisol** (stress hormone) significantly
• Improves strength, stamina, and muscle mass
• Balances thyroid hormones (both hypo and hyper)
• Boosts testosterone and reproductive health in men
• Improves sleep quality when taken at night with milk
• Enhances immunity and builds Ojas (vital energy)

**How to take:** 1/4 to 1/2 tsp with warm milk at bedtime OR capsule form 300-600mg daily
⚠️ Avoid during pregnancy

chat_messages.message: I have a sudden cold and cough
chat_messages.response:
🌡️ **Ayurvedic Cold, Cough & Fever Remedies:**

• **Tulsi (Holy Basil) tea** — 5-6 leaves + ginger + black pepper + honey
• **Giloy (Guduchi)** — boosts immunity, reduces fever fast
• **Sitopaladi churna** — classical formula for cold/cough
• **Steam inhalation** with eucalyptus oil or ajwain (carom seeds)
• Warm water with honey + ginger juice every 2 hours
• **Sesame oil Nasya** — 2 drops in each nostril prevents infections
• Rest, fasting (light khichdi only), warmth
• Avoid cold foods, dairy, sweets during illness

🌡️ **Ayurvedic Cold, Cough & Fever Remedies:**
